blended.narrative: Cascade Mountain is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 17 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 49 ft. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 26°F, winds around 22 mph. Expect powder.
